description: Salt water becoming brackish around the mouths of fresh-water brooks that empty into it. A large pond in constant communication with ocean, containing much vegetation and with a muddy bottom.
A very small pond on Penzance Neck, filled by the tide at high water.
A bay opening directly into Vineyard Sound and containing much vegetation.
A small pond on the shore of Quissett Harbor just above high-tide level, but so near to Buzzards Bay as to catch the spray during a storm ; filled with water plants.
Within the village of Woods Hole and filled with blanket algae.
A small pond close to the ocean on the road leading from Woods Hole to Nobska Lighthouse ; vegetation rather limited.
A very small pond filled with waterlilies just north of Nobska Lighthouse.
A small pond north of Quissett Harbor, shallow and full of vegetation.
